top_signals.title: Toyota to pull plug on next-gen EV development
top_signals.summary: The automaker said that it will allocate its management resources to the development of SUVs, which are in strong demand.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
